name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, shortening, sugars, eggs, corn syrup, and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring them to cooling racks to cool completely.
